text:
Created attachment 254161
[UPDATE] new version for x11-wm/picom v12.2

Hi, bump new version for x11-wm/picom to v12.2. This version fix 32-bit compilation and fix problems with the new animation system. 

Build and tested with poudriere on i386 and amd64, all ok.
